completed_tasks.name: Dashboard preview sheet + Settings + ViewModel rewrite

human_actions_pending.action: Reload com.jamesonmorrill.vigilcore launchd daemon on iMac
human_actions_pending.context: Was booted out for Phase 60 local testing; now needs to come back so the always-on local service is running again

human_actions_pending.action: Reset dashboard Settings → AI → Vigil API Base URL back to production
human_actions_pending.context: During testing Base URL was temporarily set to http://localhost:3001/v1. For normal operation should be https://api.vigilhub.io/v1.

human_actions_pending.action: Check prod DB for doubled thoughts from Phase 60 early test runs
human_actions_pending.context: Before the /v1 prefix was fixed and before we realized prod didn't have 60-01 yet, some test imports against prod may have resulted in both a preview call AND a committed call (prod ignored the preview query param). Worth running a SELECT count(*) FROM thoughts WHERE source='image' AND created_at BETWEEN '2026-04-09 17:00' AND '2026-04-09 22:00' to audit.
60-REVIEW has 3 warnings (picker snap-back, 413 off-by-one, defensive nil-photoAPI guards) that would be small and self-contained to fix

decisions.decision: Preview semantics via ?preview=true query param + forcePaperType body field (not separate endpoints)
decisions.rationale: Minimal backend surface, preserves Phase 59 commit atomicity, clean dashboard contract

decisions.decision: splitGriddedBlobToLined heuristic using \n\n paragraph split instead of re-calling Claude
decisions.rationale: Validated on real gridded photos during human-verify; no ESCAPE HATCH to Option 1 (text-only re-call) needed

decisions.decision: Narrow closure injection for userDefaultPaperType (not full SettingsViewModel)
Cancel button is unconditional, never disabled during refetch
decisions.rationale: User must always be able to bail from preview sheet; T-60-16 toggle-DoS mitigation only applies to picker + Commit

decisions.decision: Auto-delete only fires on committed photos; cancelled/errored preserves source file
decisions.rationale: Data-loss guard — clicking Cancel must never destroy the user's photo

decisions.decision: Photo triage loop removed from import path
decisions.rationale: Phase 59 /process-photo doesn't triage, and the old per-description loop didn't survive the rewrite. Photos land with category: null; existing re-triage UI still works post-commit. Documented as a known regression.

next_action: Start Phase 61 (folder-watch-feeder) via /gsd-discuss-phase 61, OR run /gsd-code-review-fix 60 first to knock out the 3 warnings from 60-REVIEW (small polish, self-contained).
context_notes: Phase 60 landed end-to-end with 4 mid-checkpoint fixes discovered during human-verify. The 2-hour debug session that chased the missing /v1 prefix taught us to add 401/404/429 HTTP status cases to mapPhotoError — permanent improvement. Phase 61 can reuse APIImageDescriptionService.processPhoto for headless folder-watcher autoimport (preview: false). Both phases 59 and 60 are now pushed to origin/main — Railway will redeploy.
